output.summary: 33.6M GPT uses int5 GPTQ compression with legal score-first backward-looking TTT and temperature calibration before final eval.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Score-first TTT adaptation trains on validation chunks (scored first) before recomputing final eval, so the model only learns from the validation shard.
techniques: int5 GPTQ with clip [-16,15] plus zstd-22 compression
Score-first backward TTT (AdamW, cosine LR, 3 epochs on last two blocks)
Post-TTT temperature calibration (T=0.98) with sliding-window eval
